selected_important_turn.text: I am just going to walk away from the deal,  my family can't freeze
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is an early escalation: after the opponent emphasized urgent need for firewood, you respond with a threat to walk away. That shifts the interaction toward zero-sum, increases pressure, and reduces the space for cooperative tradeoffs.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: Threatening to exit is consequential but unnecessarily harsh given both parties have survival needs. It shuts down collaboration, makes agreement harder, and harms trust; it could have been expressed in a way that preserves bargaining leverage while inviting tradeoffs.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Keep the urgency but avoid a blunt threat: state the seriousness of your need while inviting a concrete trade or compromise (e.g., ask for a small guaranteed amount of firewood in exchange for giving something or propose a temporary split). Show willingness to explore options rather than walk away.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (opening to tradeoffs instead of hard exit preserves possibility of mutually beneficial split)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase (reduces escalation and makes opponent more willing to negotiate)

value2reason.Low: I need a few packages of food to give me energy to keep going.
value2reason.Medium: Camping can be very involving so i need water to keep me hydrated at all times.
value2reason.High: I understand it is usually very cold up there therefore i will need a lot of firewood to ensure the fire never goes off. Also it is good for security as it keeps animals away.

value2reason.Low: It gets very hot and sunny during the day
value2reason.Medium: We are bringing a big group of people camping
value2reason.High: It gets very cold at night

dialogue.text: Hi . How is your camping trip going?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: The trip is great, how about you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: It is great too. However i am feeling very cold i need a lot of firewood to light a fire.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: We have -10 degrees temperatures at night where I am camping!!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: It is even worse here and I am not feeling well
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I am just going to walk away from the deal,  my family can't freeze
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand the cold, but I need firewood to stay warm and safe. Let's find a fair split so we can both survive this trip.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need at least 2 firewood packages to stay warm. If you give me 2, I can offer you 1 food package in return. Let’s make sure we both survive this trip.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm willing to give you 2 firewood packages if you give me 1 water package. That way, we both stay warm and hydrated. Let's make this work for both of us.
